---
title: "Figure 4 - genomic context of long-switch errors"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    code_folding: show
date: "2026-06-28"
---

This document reconstructs the two bar-chart panels formerly included in
Figure 3. The panels are arranged vertically so the repeat-class comparison has
enough width for all datasets and methods.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.align = "center", dpi = 160)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

dir.create("output/pdf", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("output/png", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("output/svg", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("output/data", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

dataset_levels <- c("hg002", "hg005", "hg01109", "hg01243")
method_levels <- c("hifiasm", "rfhap")
dataset_colors <- c(
  hg002 = "#F8766D",
  hg005 = "#7CAE00",
  hg01109 = "#00BFC4",
  hg01243 = "#C77CFF"
)
repeat_colors <- c(
  SINE = "#F564C9",
  Simple_repeat = "#B979F2",
  Satellite = "#00A9F4",
  rRNA = "#00BFC4",
  LTR = "#00BE67",
  Low_complexity = "#7CAE00",
  LINE = "#D39B00",
  DNA = "#F8766D"
)

theme_figure <- function(base_size = 12.5) {
  theme_classic(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      axis.text = element_text(color = "#222222"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12.5),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F2F2F2", color = "#4D4D4D",
                                      linewidth = 0.40),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "#4D4D4D", fill = NA,
                                  linewidth = 0.40),
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_line(color = "#4D4D4D", linewidth = 0.40),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.margin = margin(6, 8, 6, 8)
    )
}
```

## Summarize repeat overlaps

```{r data}
repeat_intersections <- read.delim(
  "all_repeat_intersection.bed",
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE,
  col.names = c("chrom", "start", "end", "repeat_name", "score", "strand",
                "repeat_class", "repeat_family", "divergence", "rm_id",
                "count", "dataset", "method")
)

repeat_order <- c("DNA", "LINE", "Low_complexity", "LTR", "rRNA",
                  "Satellite", "Simple_repeat", "SINE")

repeat_summary <- repeat_intersections |>
  mutate(dataset = trimws(dataset), method = trimws(method)) |>
  group_by(dataset, method, repeat_group = repeat_class) |>
  summarise(total_count = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(total_count > 20, !repeat_group %in% c("Unknown", "Beta")) |>
  mutate(
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = dataset_levels),
    method = factor(method, levels = method_levels),
    repeat_group = factor(repeat_group, levels = repeat_order)
  )

sd_intersections <- read.delim("all_sd_intersection.bed", sep = "\t",
                               header = TRUE)

sd_summary <- sd_intersections |>
  group_by(dataset, method) |>
  summarise(total_count = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = dataset_levels),
    method = factor(method, levels = method_levels)
  )

write.table(repeat_summary, "output/data/repeat_overlap_summary.tsv",
            sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
write.table(sd_summary, "output/data/segmental_duplication_summary.tsv",
            sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
```

## Panel A: repetitive elements

```{r panel-a, fig.width=13.5, fig.height=5.4}
p_repeat <- ggplot(repeat_summary,
                   aes(x = total_count, y = repeat_group, fill = repeat_group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(method),
    cols = vars(dataset),
    labeller = labeller(
      method = c(hifiasm = "Hifiasm", rfhap = "RFhap"),
      dataset = c(hg002 = "HG002", hg005 = "HG005",
                  hg01109 = "HG01109", hg01243 = "HG01243")
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = repeat_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c(
    SINE = "SINE",
    Simple_repeat = "Simple repeat",
    Satellite = "Satellite",
    rRNA = "rRNA",
    LTR = "LTR",
    Low_complexity = "Low complexity",
    LINE = "LINE",
    DNA = "DNA"
  )) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_comma(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.06))) +
  labs(x = "Long-switch error regions overlapping repeats", y = "Repeat class") +
  theme_figure(12.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.spacing.x = grid::unit(0.8, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = grid::unit(0.7, "lines"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12.5)
  )

p_repeat
```

## Panel B: segmental duplications

```{r panel-b, fig.width=13.5, fig.height=3.4}
p_sd <- ggplot(sd_summary,
               aes(x = dataset, y = total_count, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.62) +
  geom_text(aes(label = comma(total_count)), vjust = -0.28, size = 3.7) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ method,
    nrow = 1,
    labeller = labeller(method = c(hifiasm = "Hifiasm", rfhap = "RFhap"))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = dataset_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(hg002 = "HG002", hg005 = "HG005",
                              hg01109 = "HG01109", hg01243 = "HG01243")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.13))) +
  labs(x = "Dataset",
       y = "Long-switch error regions overlapping\nsegmental duplications") +
  theme_figure(12.5) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10.3, angle = 30, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12.5)
  )

p_sd
```

## Complete Figure 4

```{r figure4, fig.width=15.5, fig.height=4.7}
figure_4 <- (p_repeat | p_sd) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.70, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 19),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.margin = margin(7, 7, 7, 7)
    )
  )

figure_4 <- figure_4 &
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )

figure_4

ggsave("output/pdf/Figure4_error_context.pdf", figure_4,
       width = 15.5, height = 4.7, units = "in", device = cairo_pdf,
       bg = "white")
ggsave("output/png/Figure4_error_context.png", figure_4,
       width = 15.5, height = 4.7, units = "in", dpi = 300,
       bg = "white")
ggsave("output/svg/Figure4_error_context.svg", figure_4,
       width = 15.5, height = 4.7, units = "in", device = svg,
       bg = "white")
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
